meta.warn.empty:
⚠️ IRREVERSIBLE ACTION DETECTED

You are about to save this image with ZERO metadata. This will permanently erase the prompts (the 'recipe') and AI generation data from the original file.

This cannot be undone. Are you absolutely sure?
meta.export.title: Export Copy
dummy.title: 🎭 Dummy Creator
dummy.desc:
Archive your scraped collections while preserving scraper state.

• Moves originals to 'originals/' subfolder
• Creates tiny dummy files (32x32 gray images, 1-byte for others)
• Incremental processing (only handles new files on re-runs)
• No manifest needed - self-detecting system
